name: Spinach Bites
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Combine all ingredients in a large bowl.
3. Form into bite-size balls.
4. Place spinach balls on a lightly buttered cookie sheet.
5. Bake for 20 minutes or until heated through, then serve.
Alternatively, freeze the uncooked balls on a baking sheet, then defrost them for 20 minutes before baking.
